title: Structures, Unions, Tagged Variants, and Flexible Arrays · Memory Trace: Opaque Structure Evolution
summary: A packet queue combines headers and payloads while a changed variant exposes padding, inactive-union, and size-formula errors. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem opaque structure evolution increment in tagged packet representation. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Hide representation behind incomplete types and constructor, observer, mutation, and destructor contracts.

Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
